unauthorized.title: Sign-in required
unauthorized.hint: Please sign in again and retry.

forbidden.title: You don't have permission for this action

not_found.title: Not found
not_found.hint: It may have been deleted or is not published yet.

invalid_request.title: There's a problem with your input
invalid_request.hint: Please check the contents and resubmit.

rate_limited.title: Too many requests
rate_limited.hint: Please wait a moment and try again.

unreachable.title: Can't reach the backend
unreachable.hint: Please wait a moment and try again.

server_error.title: A temporary error occurred
server_error.hint: Please wait a while and try again.

network.title: Can't connect to the network
network.hint: Please check your connection and try again.

unknown.title: An unexpected error occurred
unknown.hint: Please reload the page and try again.

lib.evalForbiddenKeyword: The expression contains a forbidden keyword
lib.evalTooLong: The expression is too long (max {{max}} characters)
lib.identifierInvalid: Invalid identifier: "{{value}}" (letters, digits, and underscores only; must start with a letter or underscore)
lib.identifierTooLong: The identifier is too long (max {{max}} characters): "{{value}}..."
lib.linterLengthExceeded: The formula exceeds the length limit of {{max}} characters ({{current}}/{{max}})
lib.linterLengthNearLimit: The formula is approaching the length limit ({{current}}/{{max}})
lib.migrationInvalidV1: Invalid report-definition/v1: required fields are invalid or missing
lib.migrationMissingDefinition: The formatVersion: {{version}} envelope has no definition
lib.migrationNewerFormat: This file was created in a newer format (formatVersion: {{version}}). Versions up to {{supported}} are supported
lib.migrationUnsupportedVersion: Migration from formatVersion {{version}} is not supported
lib.migratorFormatNumberPattern: The formatNumber pattern '{{pattern}}' cannot be converted to formula-v1 automatically.
lib.migratorPipeUnsupported: The pipe operator | is not supported in formula-v1.
lib.migratorTernaryUnsupported: The ternary operator ?: is not supported in formula-v1. Convert it to IF().
lib.parserTooComplex: The expression is too complex (node count limit exceeded)
lib.parserTrailingToken: Extra token at the end of the expression: '{{token}}'
lib.sanitizeTooDeep: The JSON structure is too deeply nested (max {{max}} levels)
lib.sanitizeTooManyObjects: The JSON object count exceeds the limit (max {{max}})
lib.tableMergeAlreadyMerged: The selection contains cells that are already merged
lib.tableMergeCrossRole: Cells cannot be merged across different roles (header/body/footer)
lib.tokenizerFormulaTooLong: The formula is too long (max {{max}} characters)
lib.tokenizerReservedKeyword: '{{name}}' is a reserved keyword and cannot be used
lib.tokenizerUnderscoreIdentifier: Identifiers starting with "_" are not allowed
lib.tokenizerUnsafeStringChar: '{{char}}' cannot be used in a string literal
lib.tokenizerUnterminatedString: The string literal is not closed
lib.validationRuleEvalFailed: Failed to evaluate the validation rule: {{message}}

store.schemaVersionConflict: Another user updated this schema. Please reload.
store.usersLoadFailed: Failed to load the user list
store.productDuplicateCode: This product code is already in use
store.productVersionConflict: Another user updated the same product. Please review the latest data and try again.
